worktree: qa-merge (branch claude/qa-merge, off main c0962c1; gate runs post-merge)

tasks.subject: qa-pipeline.mjs — round-count + merge-eligibility helpers
acceptanceCriteria: nextQaRound counts qa-round markers + 1
isMergeEligible true only for approved+MohamedSerhan+qa+qa-passed; false for the 4 disqualifiers; accepts string or {name} labels
CLI cap=5, round from stdin JSON, merge-eligible from GITHUB_EVENT_PATH exit 0/1
module importable; tests pass; wired into CI check

tasks.subject: Extend claude-autofix.yml — upfront tests+changelog, qa label, revise gate
acceptanceCriteria: initiate prompt adds unit tests + user-facing-only [Unreleased] changelog bullet
post-step applies qa + dev-build + auto-fix
revise gate triggers on auto-fix OR qa (both event shapes)
YAML valid; actor-auth + structure unchanged

tasks.subject: claude-autofix-qa.yml — the QA-review loop
acceptanceCriteria: pull_request [opened,synchronize,labeled], gated qa & !qa-needs-human
round via qa-pipeline; over cap(5) -> qa-needs-human + escalation, no reviewer run
QA agent passes (qa-passed+ping) or posts <!-- qa-round --> @claude findings
perms contents:read+PR/issues:write; triggering token
YAML parses

tasks.subject: claude-autofix-merge.yml — merge on the maintainer's approval
acceptanceCriteria: on pull_request_review[submitted]; if: approved && reviewer==MohamedSerhan
gate step runs qa-pipeline merge-eligible (approved+maintainer+qa+qa-passed)
CI-green check via gh pr checks before merge; not-green/not-eligible -> holding comment, no merge
merges via gh pr merge --merge; perms contents+PR write; YAML parses

tasks.subject: Operator runbook (RELEASING.md) for QA + approval-merge
acceptanceCriteria: documents qa label → QA loop + auto-revise + 5-round cap, your-approval-only merge when CI green
states qa PRs incl. your own are auto-revised
documents creating qa/qa-passed/qa-needs-human labels
notes releases stay manual

tasks.subject: QA + approval-merge end-to-end verification (USER GATE)
tasks.verifyCommand: (operational, post-merge) PR shows qa-round->revision->qa-passed; gh pr view <N> --json state MERGED only after MohamedSerhan approval; non-maintainer approval leaves OPEN
acceptanceCriteria: qa/qa-passed/qa-needs-human labels exist
throwaway qa PR: findings -> revise -> qa-passed + ping
MohamedSerhan approval merges (qa+qa-passed+CI green)
non-MohamedSerhan approval doesn't merge; not-qa-passed/CI-red doesn't merge (holding comment)
5-round cap -> qa-needs-human + no auto-merge
maintainer's own qa PR is auto-revised
